name: Camp Oakdale
description: Come play pickleball at Camp Oakdale in Montville, CT! There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

description: East Lyme Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Niantic, CT. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: East Lyme Community Center
description: East Lyme Community Center is a place to play pickleball in East Lyme, CT. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include water and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: East Lyme Town Courts
description: East Lyme Town Courts is a place to play pickleball in East Lyme, CT. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.

fees: Fee required — Open play is one fee.  You can also reserve courts at a different fee.

name: Norwich Fitness Center
description:
Pickleball at Norwich Fitness Center
Norwich Fitness Center has quickly become a hub for pickleball enthusiasts across the region. With six indoor, climate-controlled courts, it’s the perfect place for players of all levels to enjoy the sport year-round. The facility isn’t just about open play—it’s a space where players come together for organized games, leagues, and special events that foster community, friendly competition, and growth in the game.

Whether you’re looking to improve your skills or just want to jump into a game, teaching pros are available for lessons, and demo paddles are on hand for those trying out new gear. Many players coordinate games through the TeamReach app using code NFCPB2024, which helps keep everyone connected and the action flowing.

From casual drop-ins to serious challengers, Norwich Fitness Center continues to grow as a premier destination for pickleball on the East Coast.
fees: Private — Memberships are just $35 a month, making it one of the most affordable facilities around. For those who prefer to drop in, rates range from $8 to $15, depending on employment status. Discoun

fees: Members only — Guest Day passes can be purchased at front desk for $13.00

open_play_schedule: Download the TeamReach app, and enter the group code Pickledome.

name: Pickleball Smash-it - Foxwoods Casino
description: 2 Dedicated Indoor Pickleball Courts! Tournament Surface, Pro Nets, Free Wifi, Player Controlled Bluetooth for Music, Fitting Rooms and Vending Machines for Paddles, Balls, Snacks and Drinks! Open 24 Hours inside Tanger Outlets located at Foxwoods Casino!
fees: Members only — Membership is FREE, Guests are FREE. Only pay by the hour for the court!

name: Strawberry Park Resort Campground
description: Courts around ten years old and have settled with depressions in places.  While the courts have been painted regularly the ball will skip off lines due to lack of grit in paint used.
open_play_schedule: Open play starts no earlier then 8:00 AM.  Private groups typically play later morning and in the afternoon.
fees: Fee required — Courts are for paying campers and owners and their guests.
